topic.title: When the Transformation is Started from the Command Line

body.p:
To display the stack trace in the console, add the --stacktrace parameter. This option is effective only when the --verbose (or -v) or --debug (or -d) options are also set.
Windowsdita.bat -f pdf-css-html5 -i C:\path\to\map.ditamap -o C:\path\to\output\dir -v --stacktrace
Linux/macOSdita -f pdf-css-html5 -i /path/to/map.ditamap -o /path/to/output/dir -v --stacktrace
